title: calamintha alpina subsp. meridionalis
intro: Calamintha alpina subsp. meridionalis, also known as mountain balm, is a subspecies of the Calamintha alpina plant, a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and calm the nervous system. The health benefits of Calamintha alpina subsp. meridionalis include its antispasmodic and anti-anxiety effects, making it a popular remedy for stress and anxiety relief. Herbal preparations of Calamintha alpina subsp. meridionalis include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve overall well-being.
